title: HTML Fixtures, Fake Transports, Local Servers, Properties, Faults, and Mutation · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed crawl review reconstructs html fixtures, fake transports, local servers, properties, faults, and mutation from authorization, revision, seed, URL key, response identity, robots decision, parse record, extraction provenance, frontier event, report row, failure, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for layered deterministic crawler verification suite after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice,…
objectives: Build minimal, representative, malformed, Unicode, oversized, dynamic, accessibility, and changed-site fixtures with exact purpose labels.
Use fake transports for deterministic units and a controlled local server for redirect, streaming, timeout, encoding, cache, and connection evidence.
Test URL resolution, idempotent canonical keys, scope monotonicity, fragment behavior, query policies, and adversarial address forms as properties.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

stimulus.title: Mutation Evidence case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A review site-quality team handles case 8208 during a multilingual public-service site review. Build deterministic Python evidence to combine fixed HTML, fake transports, local servers, URL properties, fault injection, and mutation evidence; no block, CAPTCHA, identity, or fingerprint evasion is permitted; then introduce a block, private field, dangerous destination, or spreadsheet formula and stop or reject it. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, TLS, HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright, browsers, files, credentials, target sites, accessibility evaluation, privacy or legal review, load, schedulers, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Deliberately break selectors, budgets, visited timing, redirect checks, robots precedence, redaction, output escaping, and cleanup and prove tests fail.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: High line coverage proves crawler tests detect meaningful defects.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Deliberately break selectors, budgets, visited timing, redirect checks, robots precedence, redaction, output escaping, and cleanup and prove tests fail. Artifact under review: layered deterministic crawler verification suite.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Mutation Evidence, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Mutation Evidence record says layered deterministic crawler verification suite looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary for Mutation Evidence.

For separate evidence from confidence, crawl one convenient page, omit owner authorization, revision, URL and robots policy, response budgets, parser and selector limits, provenance, frontier and concurrency evidence, changed fixtures, privacy, security, accessibility, stop, recovery, and controlled native transfer, then accept plausible rows as crawler proof. This does not satisfy Mutation Evidence for layered deterministic crawler verification suite.

steps.title: Authorized crawling and Python Record what required effort · Review Mutation Evidence
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Mutation Evidence: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review site-quality team handles case 8872 during an authorized nonprofit content audit. Build deterministic Python evidence to combine fixed HTML, fake transports, local servers, URL properties, fault injection, and mutation evidence; no block, CAPTCHA, identity, or fingerprint evasion is permitted; then change malformed markup or parser choice and preserve extraction provenance. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, TLS, HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright, browsers, files, credentials, target sites, accessibility evaluation, privacy or legal review, load, schedulers, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Deliberately break selectors, budgets, visited timing, redirect checks, robots precedence, redaction, output escaping, and cleanup and prove tests fail.

Evidence target: Authorized crawling and Python Record what required effort · Review Mutation Evidence.
steps.why: Retrieving Mutation Evidence through the concrete layered deterministic crawler verification suite case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Authorized crawling and Python Record what required effort · Review Mutation Evidence, keep Mutation Evidence connected to executable Python authorization, URL, response, parse, provenance, frontier, report, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Deliberately break selectors, budgets, visited timing, redirect checks, robots precedence, redaction, output escaping, and cleanup and prove tests fail.
